arabic text: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
english translation text:
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: قَدْ أَفْلَحَ الْمُؤْمِنُونَ
english translation text:
Certainly, the faithful have attained salvation
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: الَّذِينَ هُمْ فِي صَلَاتِهِمْ خَاشِعُونَ
english translation text:
—those who are humble in their prayers,
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: وَالَّذِينَ هُمْ عَنِ اللَّغْوِ مُعْرِضُونَ
english translation text:
avoid vain talk,
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: وَالَّذِينَ هُمْ لِلزَّكَاةِ فَاعِلُونَ
english translation text:
carry out their [duty of] zakat,
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: وَالَّذِينَ هُمْ لِفُرُوجِهِمْ حَافِظُونَ
english translation text:
guard their private parts,
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: إِلَّا عَلَىٰ أَزْوَاجِهِمْ أَوْ مَا مَلَكَتْ أَيْمَانُهُمْ فَإِنَّهُمْ غَيْرُ مَلُومِينَ
english translation text:
(except from their spouses or their slave women, for then they are not blameworthy;
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: فَمَنِ ابْتَغَىٰ وَرَاءَ ذَٰلِكَ فَأُولَٰئِكَ هُمُ الْعَادُونَ
english translation text:
but whoever seeks [anything] beyond that—it is they who are transgressors),
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: وَالَّذِينَ هُمْ لِأَمَانَاتِهِمْ وَعَهْدِهِمْ رَاعُونَ
english translation text:
and those who keep their trusts and covenants
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: وَالَّذِينَ هُمْ عَلَىٰ صَلَوَاتِهِمْ يُحَافِظُونَ
english translation text:
and are watchful of their prayers.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: أُولَٰئِكَ هُمُ الْوَارِثُونَ
english translation text:
It is they who will be the inheritors,
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: الَّذِينَ يَرِثُونَ الْفِرْدَوْسَ هُمْ فِيهَا خَالِدُونَ
english translation text:
who shall inherit paradise and will remain in it [forever].
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ مِن سُلَالَةٍ مِّن طِينٍ
english translation text:
Certainly We created man from an extract of clay.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: ثُمَّ جَعَلْنَاهُ نُطْفَةً فِي قَرَارٍ مَّكِينٍ
english translation text:
Then We made him a drop of [seminal] fluid [lodged] in a secure abode.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: ثُمَّ خَلَقْنَا النُّطْفَةَ عَلَقَةً فَخَلَقْنَا الْعَلَقَةَ مُضْغَةً فَخَلَقْنَا الْمُضْغَةَ عِظَامًا فَكَسَوْنَا الْعِظَامَ لَحْمًا ثُمَّ أَنشَأْنَاهُ خَلْقًا آخَرَ ۚ فَتَبَارَكَ اللَّهُ أَحْسَنُ الْخَالِقِينَ
english translation text:
Then We created the drop of fluid as a clinging mass. Then We created the clinging mass as a fleshy tissue. Then We created the fleshy tissue as bones. Then We clothed the bones with flesh. Then We produced him as [yet] another creature. So blessed is Allah, the best of creators!
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: ثُمَّ إِنَّكُم بَعْدَ ذَٰلِكَ لَمَيِّتُونَ
english translation text:
Then indeed you die after that.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: ثُمَّ إِنَّكُمْ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ تُبْعَثُونَ
english translation text:
Then you will indeed be raised up on the Day of Resurrection.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا فَوْقَكُمْ سَبْعَ طَرَائِقَ وَمَا كُنَّا عَنِ الْخَلْقِ غَافِلِينَ
english translation text:
Certainly We created above you seven levels and We have not been oblivious of the creation.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: وَأَنزَلْنَا مِنَ السَّمَاءِ مَاءً بِقَدَرٍ فَأَسْكَنَّاهُ فِي الْأَرْضِ ۖ وَإِنَّا عَلَىٰ ذَهَابٍ بِهِ لَقَادِرُونَ
english translation text:
We sent down water from the sky in a measured manner, and We lodged it within the ground, and We are indeed able to take it away.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: فَأَنشَأْنَا لَكُم بِهِ جَنَّاتٍ مِّن نَّخِيلٍ وَأَعْنَابٍ لَّكُمْ فِيهَا فَوَاكِهُ كَثِيرَةٌ وَمِنْهَا تَأْكُلُونَ
english translation text:
Then with it We produced for you gardens of date palms and vines. There are abundant fruits in them for you, and you eat from them,
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: وَشَجَرَةً تَخْرُجُ مِن طُورِ سَيْنَاءَ تَنبُتُ بِالدُّهْنِ وَصِبْغٍ لِّلْآكِلِينَ
english translation text:
and a tree that grows on Mount Sinai, which produces oil and a seasoning for those who eat.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: وَإِنَّ لَكُمْ فِي الْأَنْعَامِ لَعِبْرَةً ۖ نُّسْقِيكُم مِّمَّا فِي بُطُونِهَا وَلَكُمْ فِيهَا مَنَافِعُ كَثِيرَةٌ وَمِنْهَا تَأْكُلُونَ
english translation text:
There is indeed a moral for you in the cattle: We give you to drink of that which is in their bellies, and you have many uses in them, and you eat some of them,
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: وَعَلَيْهَا وَعَلَى الْفُلْكِ تُحْمَلُونَ
english translation text:
and you are carried on them and on ships.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِ فَقَالَ يَا قَوْمِ اعْبُدُوا اللَّهَ مَا لَكُم مِّنْ إِلَٰهٍ غَيْرُهُ ۖ أَفَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
english translation text:
Certainly We sent Noah to his people, and he said, ‘O my people! Worship Allah! You have no other god besides Him. Will you not then be wary [of Him]?’
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: فَقَالَ الْمَلَأُ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا مِن قَوْمِهِ مَا هَٰذَا إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُكُمْ يُرِيدُ أَن يَتَفَضَّلَ عَلَيْكُمْ وَلَوْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ لَأَنزَلَ مَلَائِكَةً مَّا سَمِعْنَا بِهَٰذَا فِي آبَائِنَا الْأَوَّلِينَ
english translation text:
But the elite of the faithless from among his people said, ‘This is just a human being like you, who seeks to dominate you. Had Allah wished, He would have sent down angels. We never heard of such a thing among our forefathers.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا رَجُلٌ بِهِ جِنَّةٌ فَتَرَبَّصُوا بِهِ حَتَّىٰ حِينٍ
english translation text:
He is just a man possessed by madness. So bear with him for a while.’
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: قَالَ رَبِّ انصُرْنِي بِمَا كَذَّبُونِ
english translation text:
He said, ‘My Lord! Help me, for they impugn me.’
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: فَأَوْحَيْنَا إِلَيْهِ أَنِ اصْنَعِ الْفُلْكَ بِأَعْيُنِنَا وَوَحْيِنَا فَإِذَا جَاءَ أَمْرُنَا وَفَارَ التَّنُّورُ ۙ
english translation text:
So We revealed to him: ‘Build the ark before Our eyes and by Our revelation.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: فَاسْلُكْ فِيهَا مِن كُلٍّ زَوْجَيْنِ اثْنَيْنِ وَأَهْلَكَ إِلَّا مَن سَبَقَ عَلَيْهِ الْقَوْلُ مِنْهُمْ ۖ وَلَا تُخَاطِبْنِي فِي الَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا ۖ إِنَّهُم مُّغْرَقُونَ
english translation text:
When Our edict comes and the oven gushes [a stream of water], bring into it a pair of every kind [of animal], and your family, except those of them against whom the decree has gone beforehand, and do not plead with Me for those who are wrongdoers: they shall indeed be drowned.’
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: فَإِذَا اسْتَوَيْتَ أَنتَ وَمَن مَّعَكَ عَلَى الْفُلْكِ فَقُلِ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي نَجَّانَا مِنَ الْقَوْمِ الظَّالِمِينَ
english translation text:
‘When you, and those who are with you, are settled in the ark, say, ‘‘All praise belongs to Allah, who has delivered us from the wrongdoing lot.’’
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: وَقُل رَّبِّ أَنزِلْنِي مُنزَلًا مُّبَارَكًا وَأَنتَ خَيْرُ الْمُنزِلِينَ
english translation text:
And say, ‘‘My Lord! Land me with a blessed landing, for You are the best of those who bring ashore.’’ ’
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَاتٍ وَإِن كُنَّا لَمُبْتَلِينَ
english translation text:
There are indeed signs in this; and indeed, We have been testing.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: ثُمَّ أَنشَأْنَا مِن بَعْدِهِمْ قَرْنًا آخَرِينَ
english translation text:
Then after them We brought forth another generation,
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: فَأَرْسَلْنَا فِيهِمْ رَسُولًا مِّنْهُمْ أَنِ اعْبُدُوا اللَّهَ مَا لَكُم مِّنْ إِلَٰهٍ غَيْرُهُ ۖ أَفَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
english translation text:
and We sent them an apostle from among themselves, saying, ‘Worship Allah! You have no other god besides Him. Will you not then be wary [of Him]?’
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: وَقَالَ الْمَلَأُ مِن قَوْمِهِ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا وَكَذَّبُوا بِلِقَاءِ الْآخِرَةِ وَأَتْرَفْنَاهُمْ فِي الْحَيَاةِ الدُّنْيَا مَا هَٰذَا إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُكُمْ يَأْكُلُ مِمَّا تَأْكُلُونَ مِنْهُ وَيَشْرَبُ مِمَّا تَشْرَبُونَ
english translation text:
Said the elite of his people, who were faithless and who denied the encounter of the Hereafter and whom We had given affluence in the life of the world: ‘This is just a human being like yourselves: he eats what you eat, and drinks what you drink.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: وَلَئِنْ أَطَعْتُم بَشَرًا مِّثْلَكُمْ إِنَّكُمْ إِذًا لَّخَاسِرُونَ
english translation text:
If you obey a human being like yourselves, you will indeed be losers.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: أَيَعِدُكُمْ أَنَّكُمْ إِذَا مِتُّمْ وَكُنتُمْ تُرَابًا وَعِظَامًا أَنَّكُم مُّخْرَجُونَ
english translation text:
Does he promise you that when you have died and become bones and dust you will indeed be raised [from the dead]?
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: هَيْهَاتَ هَيْهَاتَ لِمَا تُوعَدُونَ
english translation text:
Far-fetched, far-fetched is what you are promised!
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: إِنْ هِيَ إِلَّا حَيَاتُنَا الدُّنْيَا نَمُوتُ وَنَحْيَا وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمَبْعُوثِينَ
english translation text:
There is nothing but the life of this world: we live and die, and we will not be resurrected.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا رَجُلٌ افْتَرَىٰ عَلَى اللَّهِ كَذِبًا وَمَا نَحْنُ لَهُ بِمُؤْمِنِينَ
english translation text:
He is just a man who has fabricated a lie against Allah, and we will not believe in him.’
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: قَالَ رَبِّ انصُرْنِي بِمَا كَذَّبُونِ
english translation text:
He said, ‘My Lord! Help me, for they impugn me.’
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: قَالَ عَمَّا قَلِيلٍ لَّيُصْبِحُنَّ نَادِمِينَ
english translation text:
Said He, ‘In a little while they will become regretful.’
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: فَأَخَذَتْهُمُ الصَّيْحَةُ بِالْحَقِّ فَجَعَلْنَاهُمْ غُثَاءً ۚ فَبُعْدًا لِّلْقَوْمِ الظَّالِمِينَ
english translation text:
So the Cry seized them justly and We turned them into a scum. So away with the wrongdoing lot!
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: ثُمَّ أَنشَأْنَا مِن بَعْدِهِمْ قُرُونًا آخَرِينَ
english translation text:
Then after them We brought forth other generations.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: مَا تَسْبِقُ مِنْ أُمَّةٍ أَجَلَهَا وَمَا يَسْتَأْخِرُونَ
english translation text:
No nation can advance its time nor can it defer it.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: ثُمَّ أَرْسَلْنَا رُسُلَنَا تَتْرَىٰ ۖ كُلَّ مَا جَاءَ أُمَّةً رَّسُولُهَا كَذَّبُوهُ ۚ فَأَتْبَعْنَا بَعْضَهُم بَعْضًا وَجَعَلْنَاهُمْ أَحَادِيثَ ۚ فَبُعْدًا لِّقَوْمٍ لَّا يُؤْمِنُونَ
english translation text:
Then We sent Our apostles successively. Whenever there came to a nation its apostle, they impugned him, so We made them follow one another [to extinction] and We turned them into folktales. So away with the faithless lot!
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: ثُمَّ أَرْسَلْنَا مُوسَىٰ وَأَخَاهُ هَارُونَ بِآيَاتِنَا وَسُلْطَانٍ مُّبِينٍ
english translation text:
Then We sent Moses and Aaron, his brother, with Our signs and a manifest authority
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ وَمَلَئِهِ فَاسْتَكْبَرُوا وَكَانُوا قَوْمًا عَالِينَ
english translation text:
to Pharaoh and his elites; but they acted arrogantly and they were a tyrannical lot.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: فَقَالُوا أَنُؤْمِنُ لِبَشَرَيْنِ مِثْلِنَا وَقَوْمُهُمَا لَنَا عَابِدُونَ
english translation text:
They said, ‘Shall we believe two humans like ourselves, while their people are our slaves?’
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: فَكَذَّبُوهُمَا فَكَانُوا مِنَ الْمُهْلَكِينَ
english translation text:
So they impugned the two of them, whereat they were among those who were destroyed.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ آتَيْنَا مُوسَى الْكِتَابَ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَهْتَدُونَ
english translation text:
Certainly We gave Moses the Book so that they might be guided,
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: وَجَعَلْنَا ابْنَ مَرْيَمَ وَأُمَّهُ آيَةً وَآوَيْنَاهُمَا إِلَىٰ رَبْوَةٍ ذَاتِ قَرَارٍ وَمَعِينٍ
english translation text:
and We made the son of Mary and his mother a sign, and sheltered them in a level highland with flowing water.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: يَا أَيُّهَا الرُّسُلُ كُلُوا مِنَ الطَّيِّبَاتِ وَاعْمَلُوا صَالِحًا ۖ إِنِّي بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ عَلِيمٌ
english translation text:
O apostles! Eat of the good things and act righteously. Indeed I know best what you do.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: وَإِنَّ هَٰذِهِ أُمَّتُكُمْ أُمَّةً وَاحِدَةً وَأَنَا رَبُّكُمْ فَاتَّقُونِ
english translation text:
Indeed this community of yours is one community, and I am your Lord, so be wary of Me.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: فَتَقَطَّعُوا أَمْرَهُم بَيْنَهُمْ زُبُرًا ۖ كُلُّ حِزْبٍ بِمَا لَدَيْهِمْ فَرِحُونَ
english translation text:
But they fragmented their religion among themselves, each party boasting about what it had.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: فَذَرْهُمْ فِي غَمْرَتِهِمْ حَتَّىٰ حِينٍ
english translation text:
So leave them in their stupor for a while.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: أَيَحْسَبُونَ أَنَّمَا نُمِدُّهُم بِهِ مِن مَّالٍ وَبَنِينَ
english translation text:
Do they suppose that whatever aid We provide them in regard to wealth and children [is because]
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: نُسَارِعُ لَهُمْ فِي الْخَيْرَاتِ ۚ بَل لَّا يَشْعُرُونَ
english translation text:
We are eager to bring them good? No, they are not aware!
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: إِنَّ الَّذِينَ هُم مِّنْ خَشْيَةِ رَبِّهِم مُّشْفِقُونَ
english translation text:
Indeed those who are apprehensive for the fear of their Lord,
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: وَالَّذِينَ هُم بِآيَاتِ رَبِّهِمْ يُؤْمِنُونَ
english translation text:
and believe in the signs of their Lord,
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: وَالَّذِينَ هُم بِرَبِّهِمْ لَا يُشْرِكُونَ
english translation text:
and do not ascribe partners to their Lord;
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: وَالَّذِينَ يُؤْتُونَ مَا آتَوا وَّقُلُوبُهُمْ وَجِلَةٌ أَنَّهُمْ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِمْ رَاجِعُونَ
english translation text:
who give whatever they give while their hearts tremble with awe that they are going to return to their Lord
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: أُولَٰئِكَ يُسَارِعُونَ فِي الْخَيْرَاتِ وَهُمْ لَهَا سَابِقُونَ
english translation text:
—it is they who are zealous in [performing] good works and take the lead in them.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: وَلَا نُكَلِّفُ نَفْسًا إِلَّا وُسْعَهَا ۖ وَلَدَيْنَا كِتَابٌ يَنطِقُ بِالْحَقِّ ۚ وَهُمْ لَا يُظْلَمُونَ
english translation text:
We task no soul except according to its capacity, and with Us is a book that speaks the truth, and they will not be wronged.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: بَلْ قُلُوبُهُمْ فِي غَمْرَةٍ مِّنْ هَٰذَا وَلَهُمْ أَعْمَالٌ مِّن دُونِ ذَٰلِكَ هُمْ لَهَا عَامِلُونَ
english translation text:
Indeed, their hearts are in a stupor in regard to this, and there are other deeds besides which they perpetrate.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: حَتَّىٰ إِذَا أَخَذْنَا مُتْرَفِيهِم بِالْعَذَابِ إِذَا هُمْ يَجْأَرُونَ
english translation text:
When We seize their affluent ones with punishment, behold, they make entreaties [to Us].
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: لَا تَجْأَرُوا الْيَوْمَ ۖ إِنَّكُم مِّنَّا لَا تُنصَرُونَ
english translation text:
‘Do not make entreaties today! Indeed, you will not receive any help from Us.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: قَدْ كَانَتْ آيَاتِي تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْكُمْ فَكُنتُمْ عَلَىٰ أَعْقَابِكُمْ تَنكِصُونَ
english translation text:
Certainly My signs used to be recited to you, but you used to take to your heels,
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: مُسْتَكْبِرِينَ بِهِ سَامِرًا تَهْجُرُونَ
english translation text:
being disdainful of it, talking nonsense in your nightly sessions.’
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: أَفَلَمْ يَدَّبَّرُوا الْقَوْلَ أَمْ جَاءَهُم مَّا لَمْ يَأْتِ آبَاءَهُمُ الْأَوَّلِينَ
english translation text:
Have they not contemplated the Discourse, or has anything come to them [in it] that did not come to their forefathers?
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: أَمْ لَمْ يَعْرِفُوا رَسُولَهُمْ فَهُمْ لَهُ مُنكِرُونَ
english translation text:
Is it that they do not recognize their apostle, and so they deny him?
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ بِهِ جِنَّةٌ ۚ بَلْ جَاءَهُم بِالْحَقِّ وَأَكْثَرُهُمْ لِلْحَقِّ كَارِهُونَ
english translation text:
Do they say, ‘There is madness in him’? No, he has brought them the truth, and most of them are averse to the truth.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: وَلَوِ اتَّبَعَ الْحَقُّ أَهْوَاءَهُمْ لَفَسَدَتِ السَّمَاوَاتُ وَالْأَرْضُ وَمَن فِيهِنَّ ۚ بَلْ أَتَيْنَاهُم بِذِكْرِهِمْ فَهُمْ عَن ذِكْرِهِم مُّعْرِضُونَ
english translation text:
Had the truth followed their desires, the heavens and the earth would have surely fallen apart [along] with those who are in them. Indeed, We have brought them their Reminder, but they are disregardful of their Reminder.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: أَمْ تَسْأَلُهُمْ خَرْجًا فَخَرَاجُ رَبِّكَ خَيْرٌ ۖ وَهُوَ خَيْرُ الرَّازِقِينَ
english translation text:
Do you ask a recompense from them? Your Lord’s recompense is better, and He is the best of providers.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: وَإِنَّكَ لَتَدْعُوهُمْ إِلَىٰ صِرَاطٍ مُّسْتَقِيمٍ
english translation text:
Indeed you invite them to a straight path,
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: وَإِنَّ الَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِالْآخِرَةِ عَنِ الصِّرَاطِ لَنَاكِبُونَ
english translation text:
and those who do not believe in the Hereafter surely deviate from the path.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: وَلَوْ رَحِمْنَاهُمْ وَكَشَفْنَا مَا بِهِم مِّن ضُرٍّ لَّلَجُّوا فِي طُغْيَانِهِمْ يَعْمَهُونَ
english translation text:
Should We have mercy upon them and remove their distress, they would surely persist, bewildered in their rebellion.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ أَخَذْنَاهُم بِالْعَذَابِ فَمَا اسْتَكَانُوا لِرَبِّهِمْ وَمَا يَتَضَرَّعُونَ
english translation text:
We have already seized them with punishment, yet they did not humble themselves before their Lord, nor will they entreat [Him for mercy]
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: حَتَّىٰ إِذَا فَتَحْنَا عَلَيْهِم بَابًا ذَا عَذَابٍ شَدِيدٍ إِذَا هُمْ فِيهِ مُبْلِسُونَ
english translation text:
until We open on them the gate of a severe punishment, whereupon they will be despondent in it.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: وَهُوَ الَّذِي أَنشَأَ لَكُمُ السَّمْعَ وَالْأَبْصَارَ وَالْأَفْئِدَةَ ۚ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَشْكُرُونَ
english translation text:
It is He who made for you hearing, eyesight, and hearts. Little do you thank.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: وَهُوَ الَّذِي ذَرَأَكُمْ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَإِلَيْهِ تُحْشَرُونَ
english translation text:
It is He who created you on the earth, and you will be mustered toward Him.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: وَهُوَ الَّذِي يُحْيِي وَيُمِيتُ وَلَهُ اخْتِلَافُ اللَّيْلِ وَالنَّهَارِ ۚ أَفَلَا تَعْقِلُونَ
english translation text:
And it is He who gives life and brings death, and due to Him is the alternation of day and night. Do you not exercise your reason?
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: بَلْ قَالُوا مِثْلَ مَا قَالَ الْأَوَّلُونَ
english translation text:
Indeed, they say, just like what the former peoples said.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: قَالُوا أَإِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا وَعِظَامًا أَإِنَّا لَمَبْعُوثُونَ
english translation text:
They said, ‘What, when we are dead and become dust and bones, shall we be resurrected?
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: لَقَدْ وُعِدْنَا نَحْنُ وَآبَاؤُنَا هَٰذَا مِن قَبْلُ إِنْ هَٰذَا إِلَّا أَسَاطِيرُ الْأَوَّلِينَ
english translation text:
Certainly, we and our fathers were promised this before. [But] these are nothing but myths of the ancients.’
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: قُل لِّمَنِ الْأَرْضُ وَمَن فِيهَا إِن كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
english translation text:
Say, ‘To whom does the earth belong and whoever it contains, if you know?’
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: سَيَقُولُونَ لِلَّهِ ۚ قُلْ أَفَلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ
english translation text:
They will say, ‘To Allah.’ Say, ‘Will you not then take admonition?’
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: قُلْ مَن رَّبُّ السَّمَاوَاتِ السَّبْعِ وَرَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ
english translation text:
Say, ‘Who is the Lord of the seven heavens and the Lord of the Great Throne?’
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: سَيَقُولُونَ لِلَّهِ ۚ قُلْ أَفَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
english translation text:
They will say, ‘[They belong] to Allah.’ Say, ‘Will you not then be wary [of Him]?’
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: قُلْ مَن بِيَدِهِ مَلَكُوتُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَهُوَ يُجِيرُ وَلَا يُجَارُ عَلَيْهِ إِن كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
english translation text:
Say, ‘In whose hand is the dominion of all things, and who gives shelter and no shelter can be provided from Him, if you know?’
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: سَيَقُولُونَ لِلَّهِ ۚ قُلْ فَأَنَّىٰ تُسْحَرُونَ
english translation text:
They will say, ‘[They all belong] to Allah.’ Say, ‘Then how are you so deluded?’
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: بَلْ أَتَيْنَاهُم بِالْحَقِّ وَإِنَّهُمْ لَكَاذِبُونَ
english translation text:
Indeed, We have brought them the truth, and they are indeed liars.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: مَا اتَّخَذَ اللَّهُ مِن وَلَدٍ وَمَا كَانَ مَعَهُ مِنْ إِلَٰهٍ ۚ إِذًا لَّذَهَبَ كُلُّ إِلَٰهٍ بِمَا خَلَقَ وَلَعَلَا بَعْضُهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍ ۚ سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ
english translation text:
Allah has not taken any offspring, neither is there any god besides Him, for then each god would take away what he created, and some of them would surely rise up against others. Clear is Allah of what they allege!
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: عَالِمِ الْغَيْبِ وَالشَّهَادَةِ فَتَعَالَىٰ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
english translation text:
The Knower of the sensible and the Unseen, He is above having any partners that they ascribe [to Him].
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: قُل رَّبِّ إِمَّا تُرِيَنِّي مَا يُوعَدُونَ
english translation text:
Say, ‘My Lord! If You should show me what they are promised,
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: رَبِّ فَلَا تَجْعَلْنِي فِي الْقَوْمِ الظَّالِمِينَ
english translation text:
then do not put me, my Lord, among the wrongdoing lot.’
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: وَإِنَّا عَلَىٰ أَن نُّرِيَكَ مَا نَعِدُهُمْ لَقَادِرُونَ
english translation text:
We are indeed able to show you what We promise them.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: ادْفَعْ بِالَّتِي هِيَ أَحْسَنُ السَّيِّئَةَ ۚ نَحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا يَصِفُونَ
english translation text:
Repel ill [conduct] with that which is the best. We know best whatever they allege.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: وَقُل رَّبِّ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ هَمَزَاتِ الشَّيَاطِينِ
english translation text:
Say, ‘My Lord! I seek Your protection from the promptings of devils,
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ رَبِّ أَن يَحْضُرُونِ
english translation text:
and I seek Your protection, my Lord, from their presence near me.’
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: حَتَّىٰ إِذَا جَاءَ أَحَدَهُمُ الْمَوْتُ قَالَ رَبِّ ارْجِعُونِ
english translation text:
When death comes to one of them, he says, ‘My Lord! Take me back,
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: لَعَلِّي أَعْمَلُ صَالِحًا فِيمَا تَرَكْتُ ۚ كَلَّا ۚ إِنَّهَا كَلِمَةٌ هُوَ قَائِلُهَا ۖ وَمِن وَرَائِهِم بَرْزَخٌ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ يُبْعَثُونَ
english translation text:
that I may act righteously in what I have left behind.’ ‘By no means! These are mere words that he says.’ And before them is a barrier until the day they will be resurrected.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: فَإِذَا نُفِخَ فِي الصُّورِ فَلَا أَنسَابَ بَيْنَهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ وَلَا يَتَسَاءَلُونَ
english translation text:
When the Trumpet is blown, there will be no ties between them on that day, nor will they ask [about] each other.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: فَمَن ثَقُلَتْ مَوَازِينُهُ فَأُولَٰئِكَ هُمُ الْمُفْلِحُونَ
english translation text:
Then those whose deeds weigh heavy in the scales—it is they who are the felicitous.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: وَمَنْ خَفَّتْ مَوَازِينُهُ فَأُولَٰئِكَ الَّذِينَ خَسِرُوا أَنفُسَهُمْ فِي جَهَنَّمَ خَالِدُونَ
english translation text:
As for those whose deeds weigh light in the scales—they will be the ones who have ruined their souls, and they will remain in hell [forever].
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: تَلْفَحُ وُجُوهَهُمُ النَّارُ وَهُمْ فِيهَا كَالِحُونَ
english translation text:
The Fire will scorch their faces, while they snarl baring their teeth.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: أَلَمْ تَكُنْ آيَاتِي تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْكُمْ فَكُنتُم بِهَا تُكَذِّبُونَ
english translation text:
‘Was it not that My signs were recited to you but you would deny them?’
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: قَالُوا رَبَّنَا غَلَبَتْ عَلَيْنَا شِقْوَتُنَا وَكُنَّا قَوْمًا ضَالِّينَ
english translation text:
They will say, ‘Our Lord! Our wretchedness overcame us, and we were an astray lot.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: رَبَّنَا أَخْرِجْنَا مِنْهَا فَإِنْ عُدْنَا فَإِنَّا ظَالِمُونَ
english translation text:
Our Lord! Bring us out of this! Then, if we revert [to our previous conduct], we will indeed be wrongdoers.’
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: قَالَ اخْسَئُوا فِيهَا وَلَا تُكَلِّمُونِ
english translation text:
He will say, ‘Begone in it, and do not speak to Me!
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: إِنَّهُ كَانَ فَرِيقٌ مِّنْ عِبَادِي يَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَا آمَنَّا فَاغْفِرْ لَنَا وَارْحَمْنَا وَأَنتَ خَيْرُ الرَّاحِمِينَ
english translation text:
Indeed there was a part of My servants who would say, ‘‘Our Lord! We have believed. So forgive us, and have mercy on us, and You are the best of the merciful.’’
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: فَاتَّخَذْتُمُوهُمْ سِخْرِيًّا حَتَّىٰ أَنسَوْكُمْ ذِكْرِي وَكُنتُم مِّنْهُمْ تَضْحَكُونَ
english translation text:
But you took them by ridicule until they made you forget My remembrance, and you used to laugh at them.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: إِنِّي جَزَيْتُهُمُ الْيَوْمَ بِمَا صَبَرُوا أَنَّهُمْ هُمُ الْفَائِزُونَ
english translation text:
Indeed I have rewarded them today for their patience. They are indeed the triumphant.’
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: قَالَ كَمْ لَبِثْتُمْ فِي الْأَرْضِ عَدَدَ سِنِينَ
english translation text:
He will say, ‘How many years did you remain on earth?’
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: قَالُوا لَبِثْنَا يَوْمًا أَوْ بَعْضَ يَوْمٍ فَاسْأَلِ الْعَادِّينَ
english translation text:
They will say, ‘We remained for a day, or part of a day; yet ask those who keep the count.’
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: قَالَ إِن لَّبِثْتُمْ إِلَّا قَلِيلًا ۖ لَّوْ أَنَّكُمْ كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
english translation text:
He will say, ‘You only remained a little; if only you had known.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: أَفَحَسِبْتُمْ أَنَّمَا خَلَقْنَاكُمْ عَبَثًا وَأَنَّكُمْ إِلَيْنَا لَا تُرْجَعُونَ
english translation text:
Did you suppose that We created you aimlessly, and that you will not be brought back to Us?’
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: فَتَعَالَى اللَّهُ الْمَلِكُ الْحَقُّ ۖ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْكَرِيمِ
english translation text:
So exalted is Allah, the True Sovereign, there is no god except Him, the Lord of the Noble Throne.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: وَمَن يَدْعُ مَعَ اللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا آخَرَ لَا بُرْهَانَ لَهُ بِهِ فَإِنَّمَا حِسَابُهُ عِندَ رَبِّهِ ۚ إِنَّهُ لَا يُفْلِحُ الْكَافِرُونَ
english translation text:
Whoever invokes besides Allah another god of which he has no proof, his reckoning will indeed rest with his Lord. Indeed the faithless will not be felicitous.
Al Mu’minun – The Believers

arabic text: وَقُل رَّبِّ اغْفِرْ وَارْحَمْ وَأَنتَ خَيْرُ الرَّاحِمِينَ
english translation text:
Say, ‘My Lord, forgive and have mercy, and You are the best of the merciful.’
Al Mu’minun – The Believers
